text: {"type":"DRAG_FILL","title":"","lessonText":"","data":{"challenges":[{"instruction":"Fill in the blanks using the terms from the options provided. Refer to the 'Identifying Types of Gangs Walkthrough' for clues.","codeTemplate":"Street Gangs are typically involved in _____ activities and _____ wars.","options":["local criminal","turf","national","peaceful"],"correctAnswer":"local criminal, turf","explanation":"Street Gangs are known for their involvement in local criminal activities and turf wars, as discussed in the module."},{"instruction":"Complete the sentence using the correct terms. Use the 'Understanding Gang Culture: Applying Knowledge Walkthrough' for guidance.","codeTemplate":"In the Applying Knowledge Walkthrough, we engage with _____ examples to understand _____ culture.","options":["gang","interactive","violent","passive","historical"],"correctAnswer":"interactive, gang","explanation":"The walkthrough emphasizes interactive examples to deepen understanding of gang culture."},{"instruction":"Choose the correct terms to fill in the blanks. Refer to the 'Gang Influence on Communities Walkthrough' for assistance.","codeTemplate":"Gangs can have a significant impact on _____ and _____ in their communities.","options":["crime rates","education","local businesses","safety"],"correctAnswer":"crime rates, safety","explanation":"The walkthrough discusses how gangs influence crime rates and safety in their communities."},{"instruction":"Fill in the blanks using the terms provided. Consult the 'Gang Prevention Strategies Walkthrough' for insights.","codeTemplate":"Effective gang prevention strategies focus on _____ and _____ to reduce gang involvement.","options":["education","enforcement","retribution","community support"],"correctAnswer":"education, community support","explanation":"The walkthrough highlights the importance of education and community support in preventing gang involvement."}]}}
